items.description: Crash on I-99 northbound between 4.5 miles south of Exit 23: PA 36/PA 164/US 22 EAST - ROARING SPRING and 3.3 miles south of Exit 23: PA 36/PA 164/US 22 EAST - ROARING SPRING. There is a lane restriction.
